task_name: FLS Endotrainer Equipment Overview - Multiple Tasks
assessment_note: This video is an educational/tutorial compilation showing multiple FLS tasks with equipment setup and demonstrations. It does not represent a single timed performance attempt and contains instructional content with task transitions.

tasks_shown.description: Shows blue and white pegs in a pegboard trainer with instrument graspers demonstrating transfer motions
Shows pink gauze material with marked cutting pattern, scissors-like cutting tool visible
Shows Penrose drain setup with loop deployment and cinching demonstrations
Shows Penrose drain with suture placement through marks, extracorporeal knot tying with pusher

reason_not_scored: This video is classified as instructional/educational content showing equipment setup and technique demonstrations rather than a timed individual trainee performance. No single task is performed continuously from start to finish with timing. The video contains multiple task transitions, equipment adjustments, and appears to be demonstrating proper setup and basic techniques for training purposes.

demonstrated_techniques: Peg transfer: instrument positioning and grasp technique
Pattern cut: proper gauze handling and cutting instrument orientation
Endoloop: loop deployment and cinching motion
Extracorporeal suture: two-hand coordination and knot pusher use
instructional_content.verbal_cues: Spanish language title 'EJERCICIOS DEL ENDOTRAINER' (Endotrainer Exercises)
instructional_content.common_errors_addressed: Video demonstrates correct instrument hold positions and task setup, implicitly avoiding poor grasp angles and unstable patient model positioning

recommendation: To score this trainee, request a video recording of a single task performed completely from first instrument contact to task completion with continuous timing, without pauses or transitions to other tasks.
